service.name: Slack Web API
service.description: One way to interact with the Slack platform is its HTTP RPC-based Web API, a collection of methods requiring OAuth 2.0-based user, bot, or workspace tokens blessed with related OAuth scopes.

capabilities.description: Approve an app for installation on a workspace.
List approved apps for an org or workspace.

params.limit: integer (optional - The maximum number of items to return. Must be between 1 - 1)
params.cursor: string (optional - Set `cursor` to `next_cursor` returned by the previous call )

capabilities.description: List app requests for a team/workspace.

params.limit: integer (optional - The maximum number of items to return. Must be between 1 - 1)
params.cursor: string (optional - Set `cursor` to `next_cursor` returned by the previous call )

capabilities.description: Restrict an app for installation on a workspace.
List restricted apps for an org or workspace.

params.limit: integer (optional - The maximum number of items to return. Must be between 1 - 1)
params.cursor: string (optional - Set `cursor` to `next_cursor` returned by the previous call )

capabilities.description: Archive a public or private channel.
Convert a public channel to a private channel.
Create a public or private channel-based conversation.
Delete a public or private channel.
Disconnect a connected channel from one or more workspaces.
List all disconnected channels—i.e., channels that were once connected to other workspaces and then disconnected—and the corresponding original channel IDs for key revocation with EKM.

params.channel_ids: string (optional - A comma-separated list of channels to filter to.)
params.team_ids: string (optional - A comma-separated list of the workspaces to which the channe)
params.limit: integer (optional - The maximum number of items to return. Must be between 1 - 1)
params.cursor: string (optional - Set `cursor` to `next_cursor` returned by the previous call )

capabilities.description: Get conversation preferences for a public or private channel.

params.channel_id: string (required - The channel to get preferences for.)

capabilities.description: Get all the workspaces a given public or private channel is connected to within this Enterprise org.

params.channel_id: string (required - The channel to determine connected workspaces within the org)
params.cursor: string (optional - Set `cursor` to `next_cursor` returned by the previous call )
params.limit: integer (optional - The maximum number of items to return. Must be between 1 - 1)

capabilities.description: Invite a user to a public or private channel.
Rename a public or private channel.
Add an allowlist of IDP groups for accessing a channel
List all IDP Groups linked to a channel

params.team_id: string (optional - The workspace where the channel exists. This argument is req)

capabilities.description: Remove a linked IDP group linked from a private channel
Search for public or private channels in an Enterprise organization.

params.team_ids: string (optional - Comma separated string of team IDs, signifying the workspace)
params.query: string (optional - Name of the the channel to query by.)
params.limit: integer (optional - Maximum number of items to be returned. Must be between 1 - )
params.cursor: string (optional - Set `cursor` to `next_cursor` returned by the previous call )
params.search_channel_types: string (optional - The type of channel to include or exclude in the search. For)
params.sort: string (optional - Possible values are `relevant` (search ranking based on what)
params.sort_dir: string (optional - Sort direction. Possible values are `asc` for ascending orde)

capabilities.description: Set the posting permissions for a public or private channel.
